app_release_notes: v1.2.27 - New 'Why this WON' explainer on the Best Load card: tap it next to the winning charge to see, in plain English, why the most balanced load beat the ones that topped a single test. Also restores the winner's green 'best in' check on the card, and the Loads tab now shows a name for every saved load.

mac.app_release_notes: v1.2.27 - New 'Why this WON' explainer on the Best Load card: tap it next to the winning charge to see, in plain English, why the most balanced load beat the ones that topped a single test. Also restores the winner's green 'best in' check on the card, and the Loads tab now shows a name for every saved load.

windows.app_release_notes: v1.2.26 - Fixes the Best Load card so its green check marks are honest. On a powder-only ladder it was showing 'best in all metrics' even when the winning charge only won one -- it now shows exactly which categories the load actually won (your winner is still the same; only the badge was wrong).
